title: World of Tea
description: A modpack created by the team and continually updated to keep everyone entertained. If necessary, the server could potentially run 24/7 to accommodate everyone's preferences.
body: + Currently, initially the modpack will only be optimized and gradually expanded on elements such as biome, mods, and more adventures. + Will be further developed in future versions and updated according to Minecraft versions + A modpack created by the team and continually updated to keep everyone entertained. If necessary, the server could potentially run 24/7 to accommodate everyone's preferences.
